column1: I have had a long, hard day and I’m _______ tired and hungry.
I’d only been in about two fights in my life, and I lost _______of them.
A prize was given to__________ of the players.
___________ of the films is interesting. I was bored to death when I was watching them.
__________ of my dogs like playing with toys.
I don’t think ___________ of them are at home.
There are only two options and I’m not interested in _______ of them.
_________ you leave the building now or I'm calling the police.
